title: Serving Pages
excerpt: description: Learn how Cloudflare Pages handles route matching, 404 behavior, SPA rendering, and caching. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Cloudflare Pages includes a number of defaults for serving your Pages sites. This page details some of those decisions, so you can understand how Pages works, and how you might want to override some of the default behaviors. If an HTML file is found with a matching path to the current route requested, Pages will serve it.…
